checks.name: bseep_8es Section 6.3 prequalification limits

step_1_notes.description: Protected zone length measured from column face

step_1_notes.requirement: La placa de extremo debe conectarse al ala de la columna.

step_1_notes.description: Altura derivada de placa de extremo
Geometria end-plate de viga a derecha
step_1_notes.requirement: h1_vgder, h2_vgder, h3_vgder, h4_vgder y dh_vgder para trazabilidad geometrica
step_1_notes.formula: h1=d-0.5tf+pso+pb; h2=d-0.5tf+pso; h3=d-1.5tf-psi; h4=d-1.5tf-psi-pb; dh=d+1/16 in (db<=7/8 in) else dh=d+1/8 in

step_1_notes.description: Altura derivada de placa de extremo
Geometria end-plate de viga a izquierda
step_1_notes.requirement: h1_vgizq, h2_vgizq, h3_vgizq, h4_vgizq y dh_vgizq para trazabilidad geometrica
step_1_notes.formula: h1=d-0.5tf+pso+pb; h2=d-0.5tf+pso; h3=d-1.5tf-psi; h4=d-1.5tf-psi-pb; dh=d+1/16 in (db<=7/8 in) else dh=d+1/8 in

step_1_notes.description: Derived end-plate stiffener geometry and detailing edge requirement
step_1_notes.formula: h_pest_vgder = pfo_pe_vgder + de_pe_vgder; L_pest_vgder = h_pest_vgder/tan(30 deg); Ed_pest_vgder = 25 mm

step_1_notes.description: Derived end-plate stiffener geometry and detailing edge requirement
step_1_notes.formula: h_pest_vgizq = pfo_pe_vgizq + de_pe_vgizq; L_pest_vgizq = h_pest_vgizq/tan(30 deg); Ed_pest_vgizq = 25 mm

step_1_notes.description: Secuencia de soldadura para conexiones end-plate rigidizadas
step_1_notes.requirement: Para conexiones end-plate rigidizadas, la soldadura entre el ala de la viga y la placa de extremo debe ejecutarse antes de instalar el rigidizador.

step_1_notes.description: Excepcion de respaldo en la raiz cerca del alma de la viga
step_1_notes.requirement: No se requiere respaldo en la raiz del ala, directamente por encima y por debajo del alma de la viga, en una longitud igual a 1.5k1. En esa ubicacion se permite una soldadura de ranura PJP de profundidad completa.
Los requisitos de instalacion deben cumplir con las AISC Seismic Provisions y con la especificacion RCSC, salvo que este estandar indique lo contrario.

step_1_notes.description: Quality control and quality assurance for bolted assemblies
step_1_notes.requirement: El control de calidad y el aseguramiento de calidad deben cumplir con las AISC Seismic Provisions.

step_1_limits.description: Familia de perfil de viga permitida para precalificacion (viga izquierda)
Familia de perfil de viga permitida para precalificacion (viga derecha)

calculation_memory.equation: Step 1 PREQUALIFICATION LIMITS: compute each geometric value and compare directly against Table 6.1 limits using calculated vs limit checks (>= or <=, no DCR format).

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 2 probable maximum moment at plastic hinge
checks.clause: Chapter 6 / Section 6.7.1 Step 2 + Eq. (2.4-1) and Eq. (2.4-2)

calculation_memory.equation: Mpr = Cpr * Ry * Fy * Ze

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 3 plastic hinge distance from column face
checks.clause: Chapter 6 / Section 6.7.1 Step 3 + Eq. (6.7-1) and Eq. (6.7-2)

calculation_memory.equation: Sh_vglado = min(d_vglado/2, 3*bf_vglado) [4E] o Sh_vglado = L_pest_vglado + tpe_vglado [4ES/8ES]

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 4 shear force at plastic hinge

calculation_memory.equation: Vhmax = 2*Mpr/Lh + Vgravity; Vhmin = 2*Mpr/Lh - Vgravity (Eq. 2.4-3, side-specific der/izq)

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 5 probable maximum moment at face of column

calculation_memory.equation: Mfmax = Mpr + Vhmax*Sh; Mfmin = Mpr + Vhmin*Sh (Eq. 2.4-4, side-specific der/izq)

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 6.1 bolt tension rupture capacity (left)

calculation_memory.equation: Ru_b_p+_vgizq = Mf_vgizq_critico/(2*(h1_pe_vgizq + h2_pe_vgizq + h3_pe_vgizq + h4_pe_vgizq)); phi*Rn_b_p+_vgizq = phi * Rn_b_p+_vgizq, Rn_b_p+_vgizq = A_b_vgizq * Fnt_b_vgizq, A_b_vgizq = pi*db^2/4 (AISC 360-22 J3.7)

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 6.2 bolt shear rupture capacity (left)

calculation_memory.equation: Ru_b_v2_vgizq = Vh_vgizq_critico/n_b_vgizq, phi*Rn_b_v2_vgizq = phi * Rn_b_v2_vgizq, Rn_b_v2_vgizq = A_b_vgizq * Fnv_b_vgizq, A_b_vgizq = pi*db^2/4, n_b_vgizq = 4 (4E/4ES) or 8 (8ES) (AISC 360-22 J3.7)

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 7.1.1 end-plate flexural yielding (left)

calculation_memory.equation: Ru_pe_m3_vgizq = Mf_vgizq_critico; phi*Rn_pe_m3_vgizq = phi * tpe_vgizq^2 * Fyp_pe_vgizq * Yp_pe_vgizq (AISC 358-22 Eq. 6.7-8)

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 7.2.1 end-plate shear yielding (left)

calculation_memory.equation: Rn_pe_v1_vgizq = Ru_pe_m3_vgizq / (2*(d_vgizq - tf_vgizq)); phi*Rn_pe_v1_vgizq = phi * 0.6 * Fyp_pe_vgizq * bpe_vgizq * tpe_vgizq (AISC 358-22 Eq. 6.7-10)

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 7.2.2 end-plate shear rupture (left)

calculation_memory.equation: Rn_pe_v2_vgizq = Ru_pe_m3_vgizq / (2*(d_vgizq - tf_vgizq)); phi*Rn_pe_v2_vgizq = phi * 0.6 * Fup_pe_vgizq * tpe_vgizq * (bpe_vgizq - 2*(dh_pe_vgizq + 1.6 mm)) (AISC 358-22 Eq. 6.7-12)

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 7.3.1 end-plate hole tearout (left)

calculation_memory.equation: lc_pe_vgizq = min(pb_pe_vgizq - dh_pe_vgizq, pfo_pe_vgizq + pfi_pe_vgizq + tf_vgizq - dh_pe_vgizq); Ru_pe_v2_vgizq = Vh_vgizq_critico / n_b_vgizq; phi*Rn_pe_v2_vgizq = phi * 1.2 * lc_pe_vgizq * tpe_vgizq * Fup_pe_vgizq (AISC 360-22 J3.11a)

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 7.3.2 end-plate hole bearing (left)

calculation_memory.equation: Ru_pe_v2_vgizq = Vh_vgizq_critico / n_b_vgizq; phi*Rn_pe_v2_vgizq = phi * 2.4 * d_b_vgizq * tpe_vgizq * Fup_pe_vgizq (AISC 360-22 J3.11a)

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 12.1.1 column flange local bending (LFB) (left)

calculation_memory.equation: tcf >= 1.11 Mf / (phi_d * d * Fyc * Yc) (Eq. 6.7-13)

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 13.1.1 column web local yielding (WLY) (left)

calculation_memory.equation: Ru_cf_v2_col_vgizq = Mf_vgizq_critico/(d_vgizq - tf_vgizq); lb_col = tf_vgizq + 2w_w4_vgizq + 2*tpe_vgizq; phi*Rn_cf_v2_col_vgizq = phi_ductil * (6*Ct_col*kc_col + lb_col) * Fy_col * tw_col

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 14.2.1 column web local crippling (WLC) (left)

calculation_memory.equation: Ru_cw_v2_col_vgizq = Mf_vgizq_critico/(d_vgizq - tf_vgizq); lb_col = tf_vgizq + 2w_w4_vgizq + 2*tpe_vgizq; phi*Rn_cw_v2_col_vgizq = phi_wlc * Rn_eq(6.7-19/6.7-20/6.7-21); DCR_cw_v2_col_vgizq = Ru_cw_v2_col_vgizq / phi*Rn_cw_v2_col_vgizq

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 14.2.2 column web local buckling (WCB) (left)

calculation_memory.equation: Condicion aplicabilidad: same_sign(F_left, F_right), con F_left = -Mu3_vgizq/(d_vgizq - tf_vgizq) + 0.5*Pu_vgizq y F_right = -Mu3_vgder/(d_vgder - tf_vgder) + 0.5*Pu_vgder; Ru_cw_v2_col_vgizq = max(|-Mu3_vgizq/(d_vgizq - tf_vgizq) + Pu_vgizq|, |Mu3_vgizq/(d_vgizq - tf_vgizq) + Pu_vgizq|); h_col = d_col - 2*kc_col; phi*Rn_cw_v2_col_vgizq = phi_wcb * Ct_col * 24 * tw_col^3 * sqrt(E_col * Fy_col) / h_col

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 11.1.1 beam web-to-end-plate weld tension rupture (left)

calculation_memory.equation: CJP => cumple; Ru_w3_p+_vgizq = Fy_vgizq * tw_vgizq * hwef_w3_vgizq, hwef_w3_vgizq = pfi_pe_vgizq + pb_pe_vgizq + 150 mm

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 6.1 bolt tension rupture capacity (right)

calculation_memory.equation: Ru_b_p+_vgder = Mf_vgder_critico/(2*(h1_pe_vgder + h2_pe_vgder + h3_pe_vgder + h4_pe_vgder)); phi*Rn_b_p+_vgder = phi * Rn_b_p+_vgder, Rn_b_p+_vgder = A_b_vgder * Fnt_b_vgder, A_b_vgder = pi*db^2/4 (AISC 360-22 J3.7)

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 6.2 bolt shear rupture capacity (right)

calculation_memory.equation: Ru_b_v2_vgder = Vh_vgder_critico/n_b_vgder, phi*Rn_b_v2_vgder = phi * Rn_b_v2_vgder, Rn_b_v2_vgder = A_b_vgder * Fnv_b_vgder, A_b_vgder = pi*db^2/4, n_b_vgder = 4 (4E/4ES) or 8 (8ES) (AISC 360-22 J3.7)

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 7.1.1 end-plate flexural yielding (right)

calculation_memory.equation: Ru_pe_m3_vgder = Mf_vgder_critico; phi*Rn_pe_m3_vgder = phi * tpe_vgder^2 * Fyp_pe_vgder * Yp_pe_vgder (AISC 358-22 Eq. 6.7-8)

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 7.2.1 end-plate shear yielding (right)

calculation_memory.equation: Rn_pe_v1_vgder = Ru_pe_m3_vgder / (2*(d_vgder - tf_vgder)); phi*Rn_pe_v1_vgder = phi * 0.6 * Fyp_pe_vgder * bpe_vgder * tpe_vgder (AISC 358-22 Eq. 6.7-10)

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 7.2.2 end-plate shear rupture (right)

calculation_memory.equation: Rn_pe_v2_vgder = Ru_pe_m3_vgder / (2*(d_vgder - tf_vgder)); phi*Rn_pe_v2_vgder = phi * 0.6 * Fup_pe_vgder * tpe_vgder * (bpe_vgder - 2*(dh_pe_vgder + 1.6 mm)) (AISC 358-22 Eq. 6.7-12)

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 7.3.1 end-plate hole tearout (right)

calculation_memory.equation: lc_pe_vgder = min(pb_pe_vgder - dh_pe_vgder, pfo_pe_vgder + pfi_pe_vgder + tf_vgder - dh_pe_vgder); Ru_pe_v2_vgder = Vh_vgder_critico / n_b_vgder; phi*Rn_pe_v2_vgder = phi * 1.2 * lc_pe_vgder * tpe_vgder * Fup_pe_vgder (AISC 360-22 J3.11a)

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 7.3.2 end-plate hole bearing (right)

calculation_memory.equation: Ru_pe_v2_vgder = Vh_vgder_critico / n_b_vgder; phi*Rn_pe_v2_vgder = phi * 2.4 * d_b_vgder * tpe_vgder * Fup_pe_vgder (AISC 360-22 J3.11a)

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 12.1.1 column flange local bending (LFB) (right)

calculation_memory.equation: tcf >= 1.11 Mf / (phi_d * d * Fyc * Yc) (Eq. 6.7-13)

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 13.1.1 column web local yielding (WLY) (right)

calculation_memory.equation: Ru_cf_v2_col_vgder = Mf_vgder_critico/(d_vgder - tf_vgder); lb_col = tf_vgder + 2w_w4_vgder + 2*tpe_vgder; phi*Rn_cf_v2_col_vgder = phi_ductil * (6*Ct_col*kc_col + lb_col) * Fy_col * tw_col

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 14.2.1 column web local crippling (WLC) (right)

calculation_memory.equation: Ru_cw_v2_col_vgder = Mf_vgder_critico/(d_vgder - tf_vgder); lb_col = tf_vgder + 2w_w4_vgder + 2*tpe_vgder; phi*Rn_cw_v2_col_vgder = phi_wlc * Rn_eq(6.7-19/6.7-20/6.7-21); DCR_cw_v2_col_vgder = Ru_cw_v2_col_vgder / phi*Rn_cw_v2_col_vgder

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 14.2.2 column web local buckling (WCB) (right)

calculation_memory.equation: Condicion aplicabilidad: same_sign(F_left, F_right), con F_left = -Mu3_vgder/(d_vgder - tf_vgder) + 0.5*Pu_vgder y F_right = -Mu3_vgizq/(d_vgizq - tf_vgizq) + 0.5*Pu_vgizq; Ru_cw_v2_col_vgder = max(|-Mu3_vgder/(d_vgder - tf_vgder) + Pu_vgder|, |Mu3_vgder/(d_vgder - tf_vgder) + Pu_vgder|); h_col = d_col - 2*kc_col; phi*Rn_cw_v2_col_vgder = phi_wcb * Ct_col * 24 * tw_col^3 * sqrt(E_col * Fy_col) / h_col

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 11.1.1 beam web-to-end-plate weld tension rupture (right)

calculation_memory.equation: CJP => cumple; Ru_w3_p+_vgder = Fy_vgder * tw_vgder * hwef_w3_vgder, hwef_w3_vgder = pfi_pe_vgder + pb_pe_vgder + 150 mm

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 8.1.1 stiffener weld tension rupture (left)

calculation_memory.equation: Fillet: Ru_w1_p+_vgizq = Fys_pest_vgizq * t_pest_vgizq * h_pest_vgizq; l_w1_vgizq = h_pest_vgizq - c_pest_vgizq - 2*w_w1_vgizq; phi*Rn_w1_p+_vgizq = phi * kds_w1_vgizq * nl_w1_vgizq * 0.6 * Fexx_w1_vgizq * 0.707 * l_w1_vgizq * w_w1_vgizq; DCR_w1_p+_vgizq = Ru_w1_p+_vgizq / phi*Rn_w1_p+_vgizq (AISC 360-22 J2.4)

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 9.1.1 stiffener-beam weld shear rupture (left)

calculation_memory.equation: Fillet: Ru_w2_v2_vgizq = Fys_pest_vgizq * 0.6 * t_pest_vgizq * l_w2_vgizq; l_w2_vgizq = L_pest_vgizq - c_pest_vgizq - 2*w_w2_vgizq; phi*Rn_w2_v2_vgizq = phi * kds_w2_vgizq * nl_w2_vgizq * 0.6 * Fexx_w2_vgizq * 0.707 * l_w2_vgizq * w_w2_vgizq; DCR_w2_v2_vgizq = Ru_w2_v2_vgizq / phi*Rn_w2_v2_vgizq (AISC 360-22W J2b(g))

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 10.1.1 beam flange-to-end-plate weld rupture (left)

calculation_memory.equation: CJP => cumple (AISC 360-22 J2.4)

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 11.1.1 beam shear yielding (left)

calculation_memory.equation: Ru_v2_vgizq = Vh_vgizq_max; Rn_v2_vgizq = 0.6 * Fy_vgizq * tw_vgizq * d_vgizq * Cv1; phi*Rn_v2_vgizq = phi * Rn_v2_vgizq; DCR_v2_vgizq = Ru_v2_vgizq / phi*Rn_v2_vgizq (AISC 360-22 G2.1, Eq. G2-3/G2-4; kv=5.34 for webs without transverse stiffeners)

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 8.1.1 stiffener weld tension rupture (right)

calculation_memory.equation: Fillet: Ru_w1_p+_vgder = Fys_pest_vgder * t_pest_vgder * h_pest_vgder; l_w1_vgder = h_pest_vgder - c_pest_vgder - 2*w_w1_vgder; phi*Rn_w1_p+_vgder = phi * kds_w1_vgder * nl_w1_vgder * 0.6 * Fexx_w1_vgder * 0.707 * l_w1_vgder * w_w1_vgder; DCR_w1_p+_vgder = Ru_w1_p+_vgder / phi*Rn_w1_p+_vgder (AISC 360-22 J2.4)

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 9.1.1 stiffener-beam weld shear rupture (right)

calculation_memory.equation: Fillet: Ru_w2_v2_vgder = Fys_pest_vgder * 0.6 * t_pest_vgder * l_w2_vgder; l_w2_vgder = L_pest_vgder - c_pest_vgder - 2*w_w2_vgder; phi*Rn_w2_v2_vgder = phi * kds_w2_vgder * nl_w2_vgder * 0.6 * Fexx_w2_vgder * 0.707 * l_w2_vgder * w_w2_vgder; DCR_w2_v2_vgder = Ru_w2_v2_vgder / phi*Rn_w2_v2_vgder (AISC 360-22W J2b(g))

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 10.1.1 beam flange-to-end-plate weld rupture (right)

calculation_memory.equation: CJP => cumple (AISC 360-22 J2.4)

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 11.1.1 beam shear yielding (right)

calculation_memory.equation: Ru_v2_vgder = Vh_vgder_max; Rn_v2_vgder = 0.6 * Fy_vgder * tw_vgder * d_vgder * Cv1; phi*Rn_v2_vgder = phi * Rn_v2_vgder; DCR_v2_vgder = Ru_v2_vgder / phi*Rn_v2_vgder (AISC 360-22 G2.1, Eq. G2-3/G2-4; kv=5.34 for webs without transverse stiffeners)
